steps.title: Spot the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence asserts that Zhao made Academy Award history, but doesn't explain why. The second sentence must provide the explanation by establishing what came before her win.

steps.title: Supply the temporal anchor
steps.content: ”Previously” introduces the prior condition—that only one other woman had been named best director—which explains why Zhao's win is historic. “As a result” wrongly suggests consequence, “However” invokes a missing contrast, and “Likewise” suggests an unfounded parallel. That matches choice B — B is correct.
